report.title: 2km OSGB DINTY grid squares for TanHub regions
report.description: All 2km OSGB DINTY squares intersecting selected regions.
report.query: WITH regions AS ( SELECT l.id AS location_id, l.code as location_code, ST_Transform(COALESCE(l.boundary_geom, l.centroid_geom), 27700) AS geom_27700 FROM locations l JOIN cache_termlists_terms t ON t.id = l.location_type_id LEFT JOIN locations_websites lw ON lw.location_id = l.id AND lw.deleted = false WHERE l.deleted = false AND t.term = '#location_type#' AND l.name IN (#geographic_regions#) AND COALESCE(l.boundary_geom, l.centroid_geom) IS NOT NULL ), bounds AS ( SELECT FLOOR(MIN(ST_XMin(geom_27700)) / 2000.0)::int * 2000 AS min_e, FLOOR(MIN(ST_YMin(geom_27700)) / 2000.0)::int * 2000 AS min_n, CEIL(MAX(ST_XMax(geom_27700)) / 2000.0)::int * 2000 AS max_e, CEIL(MAX(ST_YMax(geom_27700)) / 2000.0)::int * 2000 AS max_n FROM regions ), grid AS ( SELECT e AS west_e, n AS south_n, ST_MakeEnvelope(e, n, e + 2000, n + 2000, 27700) AS geom_27700 FROM bounds b JOIN LATERAL generate_series(b.min_e, b.max_e - 2000, 2000) e ON true JOIN LATERAL generate_series(b.min_n, b.max_n - 2000, 2000) n ON true ), hits AS ( SELECT r.location_id, r.location_code, g.west_e + 1000 AS centre_easting, g.south_n + 1000 AS centre_northing, NOT ST_CoveredBy(g.geom_27700, r.geom_27700) AS partial, ST_X(ST_Transform(ST_Centroid(g.geom_27700), 4326)) AS centre_lon, ST_Y(ST_Transform(ST_Centroid(g.geom_27700), 4326)) AS centre_lat FROM regions r JOIN grid g ON g.geom_27700 && r.geom_27700 AND ST_Intersects(g.geom_27700, r.geom_27700) ) SELECT #columns# FROM hits h

param.name: geographic_regions
param.description: Names of the locations to include in the report, single quoted CSV.

param.name: location_type
param.description: Location type to limit the report to.
